title: ZXSpace Visual Walkthrough
description: ZXSpace visual walkthrough pairing current screenshots and artwork with gameplay, progress, and support context.
summary: ZXSpace screenshots and artwork now work as a visual walkthrough, pairing each image with what the screen shows, why it matters, and how players use it.

sections.heading: Visual walkthrough standard
paragraphs: This page uses Feature Showcase blocks rather than a legacy bottom gallery. Each ZXSpace image is paired with what the screen shows, why it matters, and how it fits into the player workflow.
The current website image set is reused as the public placeholder set until dedicated replacement screenshots are produced.

featureShowcases.heading: Core gameplay view
featureShowcases.summary: This screen shows the main ZXSpace play experience and the visual style players see during space defence runs.
body: It matters because players should understand what the screen is for, not only see the artwork.
Players use this context to connect the screenshot to setup, gameplay, scoring, progress, or support workflows.
bullets: Shows the current public website image set.
Pairs the image with practical player context.
Can be replaced later with dedicated capture artwork without changing the layout.
